column1: Incorporated in the year 1995, Dodla Dairy Limited is an integrated dairy company based in Telangana. The company derives the majority of its revenue from the sale of Milk and dairy-based value added products in the branded consumer Market. Currently, its procurement is centered in 5 states and its products are available for purchase in 11 states. It has 94 milk chilling centers. Some of their plants are ISO 22000:2005 Certified while two are ISO 50001:2011 (EnMS) Certified.
